title: Sales Manager – Singapore
description:
• Job Title: Sales Manager – Singapore
  • Location: Singapore
  • Department: Sales / Business Development
  • Reporting To: CRO - APAC

Job Summary

The Sales Manager will be responsible for driving revenue growth, managing key accounts, and expanding the company's presence in Singapore by promoting engineering simulation and digital engineering solutions. The role focuses on enterprise and strategic customers across industries such as manufacturing, electronics, automotive, aerospace, energy, and academia.

Responsibilities

Sales & Business Development

  • Drive new business acquisition and expand account revenue for Company's portfolio including ANSYS, CAD/CAE, simulation, and engineering solutions
  • Achieve sales targets across licenses, subscriptions, services, and renewals by managing the full sales cycle from lead generation to closure
  • Identify and develop new business opportunities across enterprise, SMB, government, and academic segments

Account Management

  • Build and sustain strong relationships with key decision-makers such as Engineering Heads, R&D Managers, CTOs, and Procurement to secure long-term partnerships
  • Act as a trusted advisor by diagnosing customer challenges and delivering value-driven technical solutions aligned with their engineering needs
  • Collaborate closely with technical/pre-sales and delivery teams to ensure customer satisfaction and retention

Market & Partner Engagement

  • Develop and execute go-to-market strategies tailored for the Singapore market to increase brand presence and sales pipeline
  • Partner effectively with principals (ANSYS), channel partners, and internal stakeholders to maximize market reach
  • Represent the company at industry events, seminars, webinars, and customer meetings to promote solutions and gather market intelligence

Forecasting & Reporting

  • Maintain an accurate and up-to-date sales pipeline and forecast within CRM systems to support business planning
  • Provide regular insights on market trends, competitor activities, and customer feedback to inform strategic decisions

Required competencies and certifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in engineering, business, or a related field
  • 7–12+ years of B2B sales experience, preferably in engineering software, CAD/CAE/PLM, simulation, or industrial software
  • Proven track record managing enterprise customers in Singapore
  • Strong understanding of engineering workflows and demonstrated ability in solution-based selling

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • MBA qualification preferred
  • Prior experience with ANSYS or similar CAE tools highly desirable

hiringCompany.description:
About CADFEM Group:

 

· A division of CADFEM International, based in Germany. Visit (http://www.cadfem.net) for more

· Leader in providing best in class CAE solutions (ANSYS, LS-DYNA, etc.,)

· 30+ years of worldwide FEM excellence.

· A 100 Million EURO Company.

· 30 Locations over 550 employees based in Germany, Austria, Switzerland, Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam, Indonesia, India, China, Czech Republic, UK, North Africa, Poland, Russia, and USA

· Founder of TechNet alliance, a global network of CAE experts

· Activities in Singapore & ASEAN are distribution of CAE Software Solutions, Training, Support and Consultancy
